contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Fix vault governor identity resolution — per-key lookup + whoami is_governor field
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/236
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed and fixed a vault login bug preventing governor access. Root cause: _resolve_identity_from_jwt() in vault_routes.py only used load_governors() (monolith dao_members.json), never calling resolve_key() which does SHA-256 content-addressed per-key lookup at public_keys/<sha256>.json. A prior fix (PR #233) had already merged but was never deployed — the EC2 ran stale code for ~17 hours. Second bug: whoami endpoint returned {recognized, name} but frontend checked me.is_governor (undefined → false), causing the UI to show 'not a governor yet' even after the backend correctly identified the governor.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
